entries.label: Submit director decision pack for approval
Execute final cross-domain mutation directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Director AI can prepare and submit evidence, but final mutation must go through the approval ledger.

entries.label: Post finance transaction directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Finance posting is a final accounting mutation and cannot be performed by AI directly.

entries.label: Publish final report directly
entries.forbiddenReason: AI can draft reports, but publication is a final action requiring human approval.

entries.label: Draft a command center action plan
Submit command center action for approval
Execute command center action without ledger
entries.forbiddenReason: Command Center execution must use persisted approval ledger state.

entries.label: Approve or reject through ledger RPC
Execute preview without approval ledger
entries.forbiddenReason: Approval Inbox can execute only through approved ledger RPC and never through UI-only mutation.

entries.label: Confirm supplier directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Supplier confirmation requires approval-backed decision and cannot be direct AI output.

entries.label: Create purchase order directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Purchase order creation is a final procurement mutation and requires the approved execution path.

entries.label: Finalize supplier from detail view
entries.forbiddenReason: AI recommendation must remain evidence-backed and approval-gated before final supplier selection.

entries.label: Create order from copilot
entries.forbiddenReason: Copilot output is evidence and draft only until approval ledger execution.

entries.label: Create external supplier without citation
entries.forbiddenReason: External supplier creation requires citation/evidence and cannot be invented by AI.

entries.label: Confirm supplier directly from showcase
entries.forbiddenReason: Supplier choice requires approval and must cite evidence; showcase contact buttons are not AI execution paths.

entries.label: Mutate stock balance directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Warehouse stock mutations must use approved warehouse flows and are forbidden to AI direct actions.

entries.label: Receive incoming stock directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Receiving stock is a warehouse mutation and cannot be executed by AI screen audit.

entries.label: Issue stock directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Warehouse issue flows are mutating RPCs and cannot be executed by AI directly.

entries.label: Create payment directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Payments require human-controlled approval and finance posting boundaries.

entries.label: Apply payment directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Direct payment application is forbidden for AI and must remain a human/approval flow.

entries.label: Rewrite payment history directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Accounting history is immutable evidence; AI cannot alter ledger history.

entries.label: Approve own field request
entries.forbiddenReason: Foreman can draft and submit, but cannot self-approve or execute.

entries.label: Execute quick modal request directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Quick modal AI cannot bypass approval ledger or write procurement records.

entries.label: Sign subcontract directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Contract signing is a forbidden final action for AI.

entries.label: Read cross-role finance data
entries.forbiddenReason: Contractor scope is own-records only and cannot expose finance or other contractor rows.

entries.label: Publish report directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Report publication requires explicit human approval.

entries.label: Send final document directly
entries.forbiddenReason: AI can draft and summarize documents but cannot send final documents directly.

entries.label: Send chat message directly
entries.forbiddenReason: AI may draft chat content, but sending is a user action.

entries.label: Create real estate record directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Map AI cannot create map or real-estate records without approval and evidence.

entries.label: Change user role directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Role and permission changes are explicitly forbidden to AI direct actions.

entries.label: Enroll or unenroll factor directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Auth/security factor changes must remain explicit user actions and are forbidden to AI direct execution.

entries.label: Write screen state directly
entries.forbiddenReason: Screen runtime is read-only and plan-only; no UI or DB mutation is allowed.
